HomePage.title: To get started, edit the page.tsx file.
HomePage.description: Looking for a starting point or more instructions? Head over to <templates>Templates</templates> or the <learning>Learning</learning> center.

LoginPage.title: Patient login
LoginPage.phoneStepDescription: Enter your Ukrainian phone number to receive an OTP code.
LoginPage.resendReady: You can resend the code now.

errors.phoneFormat: Enter a valid Ukrainian number in format +380XXXXXXXXX.
errors.sendOtpFailed: We couldn't send the OTP code. Please try again.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many OTP requests. Please try again later.
errors.verifyOtpFailed: We couldn't verify your OTP code. Please try again.
errors.signInFailed: Sign-in failed after OTP verification. Please try again.

RegisterPage.title: Patient registration
RegisterPage.description: Complete your profile to create a patient account and verify it with OTP.
RegisterPage.coverageIdLabel: NHSU declaration number or private insurance ID
RegisterPage.consentLabel: I consent to personal data processing according to Ukrainian Law No. 2297-VI.

errors.phoneFormat: Enter a valid Ukrainian number in format +380XXXXXXXXX.
errors.coverageIdRequired: Enter your NHSU declaration number or private insurance ID.
errors.consentRequired: You must consent to data processing before continuing.
errors.phoneExists: This phone number is already registered.
errors.registrationFailed: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
errors.otpFailed: Your account was created, but OTP sending failed. Please try logging in.

ProfilePage.title: Patient profile
ProfilePage.description: Review and update your demographic, insurance, medical, and communication details.

AppointmentConfirmPage.title: Confirm appointment
AppointmentConfirmPage.description: Review your appointment details, check insurance coverage, and confirm your booking.
AppointmentConfirmPage.reasonPlaceholder: E.g. routine check-up, follow-up for ongoing treatment…

insuranceStatus.notCoveredNote: No insurance policy found. Please contact the clinic to add your insurance details.
insuranceStatus.pendingNote: Insurance verification pending. Final amount will be confirmed at check-in.

success.title: Booking confirmed!
success.description: Your appointment has been booked. You will receive a confirmation shortly.

errors.reasonRequired: Please describe your reason for visiting.
errors.reasonTooLong: Reason must be {max} characters or fewer.
errors.confirmFailed: We couldn't confirm your booking. Please try again.
errors.patientProfileRequired: Unable to load your patient profile. Please log in and ensure your profile is complete before booking.

BookAppointmentPage.title: Book an appointment
BookAppointmentPage.description: Select a specialty, choose a physician, and pick an available time slot.
BookAppointmentPage.anyAvailableDescription: Book with the next available physician
BookAppointmentPage.noSlots: No available slots for this date.
BookAppointmentPage.confirmationPlaceholder: Booking confirmed! (Payment & confirmation flow coming soon.)

errors.slotsUnavailable: Appointment slots are currently unavailable. Please try again later.

errors.initFailed: Failed to initialize payment. Please try again.
errors.widgetLoadFailed: Failed to load the payment widget. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.paymentDeclined: Your payment was not completed. Please try again.
errors.confirmFailed: Payment was received but we could not confirm your booking. Please contact support.

LabResultsPage.title: My lab results
LabResultsPage.description: View your released lab results, physician notes, and test summaries.

errors.loadFailed: Unable to load lab results. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: Please log in to view your lab results.

AppointmentsPage.title: My appointments
AppointmentsPage.description: View and manage your upcoming and past appointments.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel appointment?
cancelDialog.message: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment? This action cannot be undone.
cancelDialog.policy: Cancellations made less than 24 hours before the appointment may be subject to a cancellation fee according to the clinic's cancellation policy.

errors.loadFailed: Unable to load appointments. Please try again.
errors.cancelFailed: Unable to cancel the appointment. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: Please log in to view your appointments.
